data.name: Hentai Evangeline
data.detailed_description:
🌙 Hentai Evangeline is an erotic hentai puzzle game that takes you into the silence of an ancient monastery, where a seductive nun with innocent grace and hidden desire awaits the one who dares to piece her together… ✝️ Only the most devoted players will complete her image and reveal her forbidden passion! 🔥




✨ Game Features:
💖 30 thrilling levels that unveil her tender body and sacred mystery!
🏆 30 achievements — for true collectors of sinful rewards!
🖼️ Gallery — save and enjoy every unlocked illustration in the calm of stone monastery walls!


🎚️ Difficulty Levels:

  • Easy — relax in candlelight and simply enjoy!

  • Normal — uncover the path to her soul and body!

  • Hard — untie the knots of her devotion… piece by piece 😉


✨ Lose yourself in her pure yet burning gaze, and let every solved puzzle bring you closer to her carnal, forbidden ritual. 👑🔥

data.short_description: 🌙 Hentai Evangeline — erotic puzzle game where a seductive nun awaits your devotion. ✝️ Solve 30 puzzles, unlock sinful rewards, and reveal her forbidden ritual of passion! 🔥
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: 2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
